name: the-portable-atheist-essential-readings-for-the-nonbeliever
description: Christopher Hitchens' curated anthology of essential atheist writings from Lucretius to Dawkins — the case for reason, science, and secular humanism across 2000 years.
useCase: Understand the case for atheism, secular humanism, and reason through the best writings from 2000 years of freethought.
knownRisks: Anthology — not a single argument but many voices
Hitchens' editorial voice is strongly present
May challenge deeply held religious beliefs
